integration_contracts.cre: CWF supplies required capability references; CRE resolves providers.
integration_contracts.execution_planner: CWF supplies validated structure and constraints; Execution Planner creates concrete plans.
integration_contracts.orchestrator_core: CWF supplies allowed structure and state rules; Orchestrator Core executes validated plans only.
integration_contracts.cdg: CDG owns governance gates and escalation rules.
integration_contracts.codeaf: CODEAF owns code-agent roles, permissions and risk handling.
integration_contracts.authentication: Authentication confirms actors and approval identities.
integration_contracts.cam: CAM registers artifacts; CWF does not manage artifacts in parallel.
integration_contracts.audit_provenance: Audit and provenance store events; CWF defines required event set.
